languages.text: "Истовая вера способна даровать людям удивительные силы, но ее клинок обоюдоостр, Вольный Торговец. Поразмыслите, не обратится ли сие оружие против вас, если та, в чьи руки оно вложено, сочтет ваши деяния недостойными? Смерть, несомая этой женщиной, всегда пребудет за вашим плечом."

"True faith can bestow astounding powers, but its blade is double-edged, Rogue Trader. Consider this: will this weapon be turned against you if the one who wields it deems your deeds unworthy? Death, in the hands of this woman, will always be at your back."
languages.original_text: "Истовая вера способна даровать людям удивительные силы, но ее клинок обоюдоостр, Вольный Торговец. Поразмыслите, не обратится ли сие оружие против вас, если та, в чьи руки оно вложено, сочтет ваши деяния недостойными? Смерть, несомая этой женщиной, всегда пребудет за вашим плечом."

traits.locale_text: "True faith can bestow astounding powers, but its blade is double-edged, Rogue Trader. Consider this: will this weapon be turned against you if the one who wields it deems your deeds unworthy? Death, in the hands of this woman, will always be at your back."

"True faith can bestow astounding powers, but its blade is double-edged, Rogue Trader. Consider this: will this weapon be turned against you if the one who wields it deems your deeds unworthy? Death, in the hands of this woman, will always be at your back."

"True faith can bestow astounding powers, but its blade is double-edged, Rogue Trader. Consider this: will this weapon be turned against you if the one who wields it deems your deeds unworthy? Death, in the hands of this woman, will always be at your back."

languages.text: «La verdadera fe puede otorgar grandes poderes, Comerciante Independiente, pero es una hoja de doble filo. Plantéese esto: si quien empuña esta arma considera indignas sus acciones, ¿la dirigirá contra usted? La muerte, en manos de esta mujer, siempre estará a su espalda».
languages.original_text: "True faith can bestow astounding powers, but its blade is double-edged, Rogue Trader. Consider this: will this weapon be turned against you if the one who wields it deems your deeds unworthy? Death, in the hands of this woman, will always be at your back."

traits.locale_text: «La verdadera fe puede otorgar grandes poderes, Comerciante Independiente, pero es una hoja de doble filo. Plantéese esto: si quien empuña esta arma considera indignas sus acciones, ¿la dirigirá contra usted? La muerte, en manos de esta mujer, siempre estará a su espalda».

languages.text: “真正的信仰可以带来惊人的力量，但它是一把双刃剑，行商浪人。想想看：如果持剑之人认为您的行为不配得到认可，这武器会不会反过来刺向您？只要由这个女人掌舵，那死亡将永远紧跟在您身后。”
languages.original_text: "True faith can bestow astounding powers, but its blade is double-edged, Rogue Trader. Consider this: will this weapon be turned against you if the one who wields it deems your deeds unworthy? Death, in the hands of this woman, will always be at your back."

traits.locale_text: “真正的信仰可以带来惊人的力量，但它是一把双刃剑，行商浪人。想想看：如果持剑之人认为您的行为不配得到认可，这武器会不会反过来刺向您？只要由这个女人掌舵，那死亡将永远紧跟在您身后。”

languages.text: « La foi véritable peut être source de pouvoirs incroyables, mais c'est une lame à double tranchant. Imaginez que cette arme se retourne contre vous si la personne qui s'en sert juge que vos actions sont indignes. Vous devrez sans cesse redouter la mort de la main de cette femme. »
languages.original_text: "True faith can bestow astounding powers, but its blade is double-edged, Rogue Trader. Consider this: will this weapon be turned against you if the one who wields it deems your deeds unworthy? Death, in the hands of this woman, will always be at your back."

traits.locale_text: « La foi véritable peut être source de pouvoirs incroyables, mais c'est une lame à double tranchant. Imaginez que cette arme se retourne contre vous si la personne qui s'en sert juge que vos actions sont indignes. Vous devrez sans cesse redouter la mort de la main de cette femme. »

languages.text: "Gerçek inanç, şaşırtıcı güçler bahşedebilir ama kılıcının iki ucu da keskindir Hür Tacir. Şunu bir düşünün: Bu silahı kullanan kişi eylemlerinizi değersiz bulursa o silah size mi dönecek? Bu kadının ellerinde ölüm, daima ensenizde olacaktır."
languages.original_text: "True faith can bestow astounding powers, but its blade is double-edged, Rogue Trader. Consider this: will this weapon be turned against you if the one who wields it deems your deeds unworthy? Death, in the hands of this woman, will always be at your back."

traits.locale_text: "Gerçek inanç, şaşırtıcı güçler bahşedebilir ama kılıcının iki ucu da keskindir Hür Tacir. Şunu bir düşünün: Bu silahı kullanan kişi eylemlerinizi değersiz bulursa o silah size mi dönecek? Bu kadının ellerinde ölüm, daima ensenizde olacaktır."

languages.text: 「真の信仰は驚異的な力を授け得ますが、その刃は諸刃です、ローグトレーダー。お考えください――それを振るう者があなたの行いを不適格と見なせば、その武器はあなたに向けられるのではないでしょうか？ あの女の手にある死は、常にあなたの背後にあり続けることでしょう」
languages.original_text: "True faith can bestow astounding powers, but its blade is double-edged, Rogue Trader. Consider this: will this weapon be turned against you if the one who wields it deems your deeds unworthy? Death, in the hands of this woman, will always be at your back."

traits.locale_text: 「真の信仰は驚異的な力を授け得ますが、その刃は諸刃です、ローグトレーダー。お考えください――それを振るう者があなたの行いを不適格と見なせば、その武器はあなたに向けられるのではないでしょうか？ あの女の手にある死は、常にあなたの背後にあり続けることでしょう」

languages.text: "Wahrer Glaube kann erstaunliche Kräfte verleihen, aber seine Klinge ist zweischneidig, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}. Stellt Euch vor: Wird sich diese Waffe gegen Euch wenden, wenn ihr Träger Eure Taten für unwürdig hält? In den Händen dieser Frau steht der Tod immer hinter Euch."
languages.original_text: "True faith can bestow astounding powers, but its blade is double-edged, Rogue Trader. Consider this: will this weapon be turned against you if the one who wields it deems your deeds unworthy? Death, in the hands of this woman, will always be at your back."

traits.locale_text: "Wahrer Glaube kann erstaunliche Kräfte verleihen, aber seine Klinge ist zweischneidig, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}. Stellt Euch vor: Wird sich diese Waffe gegen Euch wenden, wenn ihr Träger Eure Taten für unwürdig hält? In den Händen dieser Frau steht der Tod immer hinter Euch."
